theme.hero_task: Pick and taste the first ripe cherry tomatoes

tasks.action: Pick first ripe cherry tomatoes from Bed C (Sungold)

prompt.en: The orange ones are ripe! Twist gently and taste -- so sweet!
prompt.da: De orange er modne! Vrid forsigtigt og smag -- saa soedt!

prompt.en: Strawberry patrol continues! Check under the leaves too.
prompt.da: Jordbaerpatruljen fortsaetter! Tjek ogsaa under bladene.

tasks.action: Harvest cucumbers from Bed C (pick when 10-15cm)

prompt.en: Pick them small -- they taste better little! Use scissors to cut the stem.
prompt.da: Pluk dem smaa -- de smager bedre, naar de er smaa! Brug saks til at klippe stilken.

tasks.action: Water all beds -- extra for tomatoes and cucumbers

prompt.en: Tomatoes and cucumbers are thirsty in summer -- give them a big drink!
prompt.da: Tomater og agurker er toerstige om sommeren -- giv dem en stor slurk!

tasks.action: Check Tumbling Tom on Bed E for first tomatoes

prompt.en: Look at the hanging tomatoes -- any turning red yet?
prompt.da: Kig paa de haengende tomater -- er nogen ved at blive roede?

growth_events.event: First Sungold cherry tomatoes ripening to golden orange

prompt.en: See the golden orange ones? Those are ready! Pop one in your mouth!
prompt.da: Ser du de gyldne orange? De er klar! Pop en i munden!

growth_events.event: Nasturtiums bursting into flower -- orange and red blooms

prompt.en: The nasturtiums are flowering! Try eating a petal -- it tastes peppery!
prompt.da: Nasturtierne blomstrer! Proev at spise et kronblad -- det smager peberagtigt!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow seventh succession radish in Bed A
Sow fifth succession lettuce in Bed D
Sow fourth spring onion batch in Bed D
